title: RSI Mean-Reversion: XRP <-> rUSD
summary: Small tactical sells into rUSD on overbought XRP (high RSI), buy back when RSI falls. Aims to capture mean-reversion and short-term volatility.
trigger: RSI(14) >= 72 => partial SELL to rUSD; RSI(14) <= 28 => BUY back to XRP
action: Split sell: 2-5% of XRP balance when RSI high; buy back increments on RSI low until target exposure restored.
sizing: Position sizing: max 5% of nominal XRP holdings per signal; scale in/out using 3-step ladder. Stop-loss: if price moves >6% adverse during open leg, cancel further sells/buys.
prereqs: Trustline to rUSD issuer required. Sufficient XRP and rUSD gateway liquidity. Minimum XRP balance threshold to avoid dust.
notes: Conservative approach: preserve base exposure. Consider order-book depth to avoid slippage. Suitable for day trading and small gas-free adjustments on XRPL.

title: Xahau Token Spread Capture
summary: Monitor the orderbook / gateways for Xahau token spreads and capture small instantaneous spreads between gateway offers and DEX offers.
trigger: On visible spread > configured threshold and depth sufficient => place limit buy/sell to capture spread.
action: Place limit orders layered by size. Cancel if not filled within short TTL (60s). Prioritize venues with low taker fees.
sizing: Small sizes: 0.5%–2% of token holdings per order. Max exposure capped to prevent inventory imbalance.
prereqs: Familiarity with Xahau token conventions, trustlines to token issuers, and gateway liquidity. Monitor fees and potential transfer delays.
notes: Spread capture requires active monitoring of orderbook snapshots and order lifetimes. Can be extended to cross-gateway arbitrage if safe on settlement timing.

title: Small LP / Liquidity Provision (read-only watch)
summary: Identify low-to-medium volatility pairs and provide liquidity by quoting tight two-sided offers; collect spreads and fees.
trigger: Manual enable after verifying volume and depth. Monitor inventory skew and withdraw on adverse one-sided fills.
action: Place paired offers on both sides within a spread band; rebalance hourly or when imbalance >10%.
sizing: Keep exposure limited: at most 10% of deployable capital in LP at any time. Use automated rebalance thresholds.
prereqs: Trustlines for both sides, careful fee accounting and on-chain settlement monitoring.
notes: LP strategies on XRPL are sensitive to on-ledger offers/partial fills and gateway behavior. Start narrow and small.

title: Whale Flow Reactive Hedge
summary: Watch large on-ledger transfers (inflows to gateways or exchange addresses). When detected, tighten risk or place protective orders.
trigger: Large transfer to exchange/gateway OR sudden balance change in watched addresses => increase caution/hedge.
action: Alert owner and optionally hedge by shifting a small portion of XRP to stable issued tokens (rUSD) or reduce exposure.
sizing: Hedge size: configurable, default 3–7% of exposure for initial reaction. Escalate if follow-through confirmed.
prereqs: On-chain monitoring infra (account_tx, gateway tracking). Owner must approve escalation policy for automated execution.
notes: This strategy is more about defensive posture; it should be paired with strong alerting and optionally manual confirmation before larger hedges.

title: Scheduled Rebalance: Basket Strategy
summary: Periodic rebalancing of a small token basket (XRP, Xahau, selected issued tokens) to target allocations to capture rebalancing drift.
trigger: Time-based (hourly/daily) or volatility-based when asset weights deviate more than X%.
action: Execute small limit trades to restore target weights, prefer passive fills; fallback to taker only if unable to reach weights.
sizing: Rebalance quotas: 1–3% of portfolio per run. Minimum trade size enforced.
prereqs: Trustlines for all issued tokens; gateway liquidity checks. Scheduling and execution controlled on server side.
notes: Designed for low-churn portfolio maintenance rather than aggressive trading.
